3:53 PM

3:53 PM

3:53 PM

3:53 PM

3:54 PM

3:54 PM

3:54 PM

3:54 PM

3:56 PM

ShunSY 3/16/2024 3:56 PM
Abyss was ultimaly my tool as a life simulator to answer questions i had in class
3:56 PM
you can attend 10 business class
3:56 PM
and leave with nothing
3:56 PM
but if you go to 1 business class, reprecate the textbook knowledge with abyss
3:56 PM
you can figure out what work, what doesn't
3:57 PM
what require addional knowledge
3:57 PM
what resource you need
3:57 PM
some strategic sound fucking amazine until you realize the person who did that is the son of super rich person and have unlimited resource to throw at his competitors
3:57 PM
so what strategic can you use when you have little resource
3:58 PM
what strategic can u use when you have a lot of resource
velt 3/16/2024 3:58 PM
That's a good question..
ShunSY 3/16/2024 3:58 PM
so thats basiclly how i use abyss
3:58 PM
to answer these questions for me
3:58 PM
because textbook questons are design in such a perfect way to answer a perfect question
3:58 PM
but life is never the same
3:59 PM
lets say you learn a cool thing in cybersecuirty
3:59 PM
and you want to implment it
3:59 PM
you will soon find out , there is a cost involve
3:59 PM
we might had to add code to our server to make sure it work property
3:59 PM
who should be the one own the software
4:00 PM
who will be your replacement
4:00 PM
what document do we need to write for this software
4:00 PM
which rank should be part of it
4:00 PM
which rank should have access to make modify
4:00 PM
can we design a API where the moment we give someone a discord rank it auto add them to that software ?
4:00 PM
and etc
4:00 PM
which are all the shit people don't talk about in textbooks (edited)

4:09 PM

4:09 PM
or I feel like i answer this question wrong, can your guys tell me how i can answer it better
4:09 PM
or ask about things u don't know how to handle
4:09 PM

4:10 PM

4:10 PM
see how that event play out differently in others life
4:10 PM

4:11 PM
